title: olearia hookeri
intro: Olearia hookeri, also known as tree daisy or mountain daisy, is a shrub-like flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Olearia hookeri include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
